title: Pizza Cutter Wheel Stainless Steel with Finger Guard – Sharp, Non Slip Cutting Wheel, Dishwasher Safe with Hanging Loop + Chef Aid Butterfly Can Opener Silver
features: CUT AND SLICE: through crispy pizzas and their toppings with ease with this stainless-steel pizza cutter
ENJOY: Your favourite pizzas, flat breads and Naans with friends and family with the help of our razor sharp and easy to use Pizza Cutter!
DISHWASHER SAFE: This Easy to use and dishwasher safe pizza cutter allows for precise and easy slicing with the use of the stainless wheel mounted on the guarded handle.
STURDY HANDLE: Features a sturdy handle and finger guard so that you can cut into pizza quickly and safely.
